description: Default permissions for development tasks (implement Jira tickets, code changes, PRs).

operations.description: Read all ticket fields (summary, description, assignee, status, history, labels, etc.)
Add a comment to the ticket
Update a comment added by this task
Update ticket labels for workflow metadata
Change ticket status (e.g. To Do -> In Progress -> In Review)
Change ticket assignee
Search repositories by query text
Read repository metadata and branch overview
Read the tree of an already-cloned repository
Read a file from an already-cloned repository
Read a file from remote repository via API (no clone)
List directory contents in remote repository via API (no clone)
Clone a repository into shared workspace
Pull or fetch remote repo to sync
List repository branches
Get default branch and protected branch list
Get branch protection rules
Create a non-protected development branch
Push a non-protected development branch to remote
Update (force-push) a non-protected development branch
Search code in a repository
Compare two branches or commits
Create a PR from dev branch to default/release branch
Read pull request details
List pull requests
Add comments to a PR created or owned by this task
List pull request comments
Update a PR created by this task
Fetch Figma design content (pages, nodes, specs)
Fetch Google Stitch design content (screens, code)
Inspect UI element specs from design tool
Modify ticket title/summary
Modify ticket body/description
Delete a Jira ticket
Delete a comment
Delete a repository
Create a protected branch name such as main/master/develop/release/*
Push directly to a protected branch
Force-update a protected branch
Delete a protected branch
